title: IQE bets on AI data-centre demand to drive 20% sales growth in 2026
summary: IQE, the Cardiff-based maker of compound semiconductor wafers, expects revenue to grow by more than 20% in 2026, betting that surging AI data-centre demand for its light-carrying materials will pull it clear of a bruising year.
caption: output/2026-07-21/iqe-bets-on-ai-data-centre-demand-to-drive-20-sales-growth-in-2026.txt
